mapper.sql: select d.id as document_id, v.id as document_version_id, d.title, d.document_type, v.version_no, v.original_filename, v.file_ext, v.file_size, v.module_id, m.module_code, m.module_name, m.description as module_description, m.sort_order as module_sort_order from knowledge_base_version_document s join knowledge_base_version kbv on kbv.id = s.knowledge_base_version_id and kbv.del_flag = '0' and kbv.status = 'published' join knowledge_base kb on kb.id = kbv.knowledge_base_id and kb.del_flag = '0' and kb.current_version_id = kbv.id join course_document d on d.id = s.document_id and d.tenant_id = s.tenant_id and d.course_id = kb.course_id and d.del_flag = '0' join course_document_version v on v.id = s.document_version_id and v.tenant_id = s.tenant_id and v.document_id = d.id and v.del_flag = '0' left join course_module m on m.id = v.module_id and m.tenant_id = s.tenant_id and m.course_id = kb.course_id and m.del_flag = '0' and m.status = 'active'
mapper.select:
where s.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and kb.course_id = #{courseId} and s.knowledge_base_version_id = #{versionId} and s.del_flag = '0' and (v.module_id is null or m.id is not null)
and v.module_id = #{query.moduleId}
and (lower(d.title) like concat('%', lower(#{query.keyword}), '%') or lower(v.original_filename) like concat('%', lower(#{query.keyword}), '%'))
and lower(v.file_ext) = lower(#{query.fileExt})
order by m.sort_order nulls first, m.id nulls first, d.id

select max(m.module_name) from knowledge_base_version_document s join knowledge_base_version kbv on kbv.id=s.knowledge_base_version_id and kbv.status='published' and kbv.del_flag='0' join knowledge_base kb on kb.id=kbv.knowledge_base_id and kb.course_id=#{courseId} and kb.current_version_id=kbv.id and kb.del_flag='0' join course_document_version v on v.id=s.document_version_id and v.tenant_id=s.tenant_id and v.del_flag='0' join course_module m on m.id=v.module_id and m.tenant_id=s.tenant_id and m.course_id=kb.course_id and m.status='active' and m.del_flag='0' where s.tenant_id=#{tenantId} and s.knowledge_base_version_id=#{versionId} and s.del_flag='0' and m.id=#{moduleId}
